strengths: Extensive TypeScript and fullstack expertise far exceeding role requirements, with proven production experience at senior levels
Strong software craftsmanship background with deep testing/TDD practices and clean architecture focus, aligning with role values
Diverse technical breadth across React, Node.js, databases, AWS, Docker, and infrastructure—can independently solve problems across the stack
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level IC role; likely boredom, flight risk, and scope mismatch
Current career gap (October 2025–present) unexplained; pattern of frequent role changes and multiple concurrent positions raises questions about stability and commitment
Resume suggests trajectory toward technical leadership and founding—unclear why stepping back into junior IC work; career intent misaligned with role progression
response.justification: Bogdan possesses technical skills far exceeding this entry-level role, with deep TypeScript, React, Node.js, testing, and infrastructure expertise. However, this is fundamentally a poor fit: a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience will rapidly outgrow or disengage from junior IC work. The recent career gap and pattern of frequent role changes compound concerns about stability. This candidate belongs in a senior IC, tech lead, or architect role—not as an entry-level developer.
